flashcards.definition: A parallelogram with all four sides congruent.
Diagonals of a rhombus are perpendicular and bisect each other.
A rectangle AND a rhombus — all sides ≅, all angles 90°, diagonals ≅ and ⊥.
Each diagonal of a rhombus bisects a pair of opposite angles.
A parallelogram with one pair of consecutive sides congruent is a rhombus.
